subject: Create backend-reviewer agent
description: Create ~/.claude/agents/backend-reviewer/ with: agent.md (API design, data handling, error patterns, security), agent.yaml (model: haiku, thinking: true, tier: 1.5, subagent_type: Explore), sharp-edges.yaml (SQL injection, auth bypass, data leaks, etc), CLAUDE.md. Multi-language aware (Go, Python, R, TS).
